__comment: Default agent preset definitions. Seeded automatically on first install — edit via /mixdog:config or directly in the data directory.

presets.__comment: Cheapest tier — use for fast classification and retrieval roles (memory cycle, search, recall, explore).
presets.name: HAIKU

presets.__comment: Mid-tier Sonnet — balanced cost/quality for curation and summarisation tasks.
presets.name: SONNET MID

presets.__comment: High-effort Sonnet — default for implementation roles (worker, tester).
presets.name: SONNET HIGH

presets.__comment: Mid-effort Opus — not assigned by default; available for custom role bindings.
presets.name: OPUS MID

presets.__comment: Highest-effort Opus — default for quality-critical roles (reviewer, debugger).
presets.name: OPUS XHIGH

maintenance.__comment: Internal pipeline role-to-preset bindings. Values must match a preset 'name' above.

bridge.__comment: Per-role iteration caps for user-defined roles in user-workflow.json. Hidden system roles (recall-agent, search-agent, explorer, cycle*-agent, scheduler-task, webhook-handler, proactive-decision) have built-in caps in code. Rename / remove the keys below to match your active role set; unlisted user roles fall back to `default`.
